ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "full_text" TEXT /* Full text of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "statuses_count" INTEGER /* Number of statuses the user has posted */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified or not */,
  "full_retweet_text" TEXT /* Full text of the retweet, if applicable */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user being replied to */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" INTEGER /* Status ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Whether the tweet is possibly sensitive */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographical location data */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the tweet */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place where the tweet was posted */,
  "withheld_in_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the tweet is withheld */,
  "withheld_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the tweet's withholding (e.g., status, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "profile_banner_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile banner */,
  "protected" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is protected */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user is verified */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "statuses_count" INTEGER /* Number of statuses the user has posted */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the user has */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is in */,
  "utc_offset" INTEGER /* UTC offset of the user's timezone */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* User's timezone */,
  "geo_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the user has geo location enabled */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the user */,
  "contributors_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the user has contributors enabled */,
  "is_translator" INTEGER /* Whether the user is a translator */,
  "translator_type" TEXT /* Type of translator */,
  "withheld_in_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the user's account is withheld */,
  "withheld_scope" TEXT /* Scope of the user's account withholding (e.g., status, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "retweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the retweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the retweet was posted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the retweet */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the retweet */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes of the retweet */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes of the retweet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the retweet (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Score indicating the trendiness of the hashtag */,
  "first_occurrence" TEXT /* First occurrence of the hashtag */,
  "last_occurrence" TEXT /* Last occurrence of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., user, hashtag, URL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL used in the tweet */,
  "expanded_url" TEXT /* Expanded URL */,
  "display_url" TEXT /* Display URL */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the URL */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the URL content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the URL content */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the URL content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Score indicating the sentiment intensity */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "influencer_score" REAL /* Score indicating the user's influence */,
  "followers_growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of followers */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* Overall influence score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Score indicating the trendiness */,
  "first_occurrence" TEXT /* First occurrence of the trend */,
  "last_occurrence" TEXT /* Last occurrence of the trend */,
  "geographical_scope" TEXT /* Geographical scope of the trend (e.g., global, country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_trends" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date and time */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Permission level of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the analyst */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the analyst's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., trend analysis, sentiment analysis) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
